name: Sour Dough Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and salt.
2. Add the warm water and sugar, stirring until well combined.
3. Allow the batter to stand overnight or for at least 8 hours (unrefrigerated).
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. As needed, combine equal parts of the cooled dough and flour (1-1/2 cups) with melted butter (1/2 cup) in a bowl.
6. Fill the muffin pan with the batter.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Turn out onto a wire rack to cool.
